claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: selectable text spans with stable consumer ids
semantics.rolePolicy: No live region is present by default; opt-in announcements are polite and atomic.

keyboard.behavior: Native text selection and copy remain available while streaming.

nonColor: Text and data-status expose state without cursor color.
responsive: Text wraps anywhere while remaining selectable; no animation owns layout.
streamingPolicy: New segments append without replacing stable prior nodes. The announcement channel is debounced and opt-in, and reduced motion removes cursor animation.
consumerResponsibilities: Throttle model output before it reaches expensive rich renderers.
Sanitize any renderer outside this plain-text component.
Do not expose private chain-of-thought or sensitive model/provider data.
